name: Blender Hollandaise
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the egg yolks, lemon juice, prepared mustard, and a dash of cayenne in a blender container.
2. Blend until combined.
3. Heat the butter or margarine in a saucepan until melted and almost boiling.
4. With the blender running, slowly pour about one third of the hot butter into the blender container in a thin stream.
5. Turn the blender on high speed and continue to pour in the remaining hot butter, blending until the mixture is smooth and thickened.
Makes about 1 cup.
